name: Racing
description: High-speed vehicular competition with realistic or arcade physics and vehicle customization

mechanics.coreLoop: Choose vehicle → Race against opponents → Master tracks and mechanics → Earn currency → Upgrade and customize vehicle → Unlock new races and vehicles
playerActions: Accelerate, brake, and steer with precision
Drift around corners for speed boosts
Use nitrous oxide for temporary speed bursts
Draft behind opponents to reduce air resistance
Navigate shortcuts and optimal racing lines
Avoid or use traffic (in street racing variants)
Perform stunts and tricks (in arcade variants)
Customize vehicle handling, appearance, and performance

mechanics: Complete races to unlock new tracks and championships
Earn currency from race positions and challenges
Upgrade vehicle parts (engine, tires, suspension, etc.)
Unlock new vehicle classes (street → sport → supercar → hypercar)
Career mode progression through racing leagues

winConditions: Finish race in 1st place (or top 3 for progression)
Achieve 100% completion (all races, all gold medals)
failConditions: Finish too low in standings to progress
Total vehicle damage causing DNF (in realistic sims)
Generally can retry races without penalty

resourceSystems.name: Currency (Credits)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Earned from races, spent on vehicles and upgrades

resourceSystems.name: Nitrous/Boost
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited turbo for overtaking, refills via drifting or pickups

resourceSystems.name: Vehicle Damage
resourceSystems.mechanics: Crashes damage car, affecting performance (in realistic sims)

resourceSystems.name: Reputation/License Points
resourceSystems.mechanics: Progress metric unlocking higher tier events

setting.location: Race tracks worldwide, city streets, mountain passes, off-road terrain
setting.worldType: Grounded in automotive culture, racing leagues, and street racing scenes

protagonist.background: Up-and-coming racer, street racing newcomer, or professional driver seeking championship
protagonist.motivation: Become racing champion, earn respect in street scene, win prize money, prove skills
abilities: Expert driving skills and vehicle control
Split-second decision making at high speeds
Understanding of racing lines and vehicle dynamics

conflict.primary: Rise through racing ranks to become champion, defeating rivals and overcoming challenges

worldRules.physics: Realistic vehicle physics (simulation) or arcade physics with enhanced control
worldRules.magic: No magic - pure driving skill and engineering
worldRules.technology: High-performance vehicles with modern or futuristic automotive technology

difficulty: Easy to learn, challenging to master
targetAudience: Players seeking high-speed competition and vehicle customization
